seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The word "resign" must appear exactly three times, conveying the definition "to voluntarily leave a job or position."
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "resign" in the email.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The word "resign" must appear exactly three times, conveying the definition "to voluntarily leave a job or position." Avoid using the keyword "resign" in the email.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I intend to resign from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My final day of employment will be [Your Last Date].

I have decided to resign to pursue a new opportunity that aligns with my long-term career goals. I am incredibly grateful for the opportunities I have had while working with the team and appreciate the support you have provided during my time here.

I want to ensure a smooth transition before I resign. Please let me know how I can best assist in handing over my current projects and responsibilities to other team members over the coming weeks.

Thank you again for everything.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
